commit_message:
Fix VarRef lookup for module-level variables (#6741) Fix VarRef lookup for module-level variables (#6741) This patch fixes #6741 by skipping the m_packageScopes lookup when a VarRef’s classOrPackagep points to a module.

Thanks to @udayaa-init .
